summary: Full-stack retest for VidVault iteration 4 (mirror-domain rewrite + friendly yt-dlp errors + expo-media-library integration). All 9 backend pytest cases pass (root, YouTube short via yt-dlp with video+audio formats, direct MP4 supported, HTML unsupported with reason, xhamster.desi returns supported=false with 'extractor couldn't find a playable stream' friendly reason (no raw traceback), unreachable URL supported=false, empty url 400, missing url field 422, ftp scheme 400). Frontend web bundle loads cleanly with the new expo-media-library plugin config in app.json — no red screen, no runtime errors. Home renders, Analyze on YouTube short URL returns Video Info screen with title/author/size and 360p MP4 + M4A audio formats (yt-dlp round trip verified via UI). Settings screen exposes the new 'setting-save-to-gallery' toggle which toggles ON/OFF without errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py _rewrite_url() correctly maps hi.xhamster.desi → xhamster.com before yt-dlp extraction; verified indirectly (both candidate URLs are tried and the friendly error covers the case).

server.py _friendly_yt_error() maps 'no video formats found' to the exact wording requested. The response for hi.xhamster.desi is: 'hi.xhamster.desi loaded but the extractor couldn't find a playable stream. This usually means the site changed recently — try again in a few days after yt-dlp updates, or use a different source.' — clean, no traceback.

downloader.ts now correctly uses the new synchronous getState() from the store (replacing the broken useAppStore.getState()). exportToGallery early-returns on Platform.OS==='web' as noted in agent-to-agent context, so no web preview crash from expo-media-library.
app-store.ts exposes both useAppStore (React hook) and getState (synchronous snapshot reader). Snapshot is refreshed inside emit(), so getState() from services returns the latest data.

app.json expo-media-library plugin config is valid (photosPermission/savePhotosPermission/isAccessMediaLocationEnabled) and Android permissions include READ_MEDIA_VIDEO/AUDIO/IMAGES. iOS Info.plist has NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription and NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (home render, analyze YouTube round-trip, settings toggle)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_analyze_api.py (9 cases). Frontend URL TextInput is a <textarea data-testid='home-url-input' placeholder='Paste or Enter Video URL'>. Settings toggle testID: 'setting-save-to-gallery'. YouTube short URL used in tests: https://youtu.be/PKKXh8S8Apk.
rca_of_issue: N/A — feature verification pass. All items in the review request are green.
